title: .github/copilot-instructions.md support for IntelliJ
author: PPriest
text:
Does anyone know if .github/copilot-instructions.md also support in IntelliJ ?
Background: There's a new guideline to include custom instructions file .github/copilot-instructions.md
for copilot in visual studio code.
more details: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization
I try using this in visual studio code and wondering if copilot custom instructions also avaiable in intelliJ
